message:
feat: continuous backpressure severity with sigmoid + EMA smoothing (wa-1qz1.6)

Implements ContinuousBackpressure model with sigmoid severity function,
exponential moving average smoothing for natural hysteresis, proportional
throttle actions (poll backoff, pane skip, detection skip, buffer limit),
and backward-compatible BackpressureTier mapping. 27 unit tests + 7
proptest properties (monotonicity, continuity, range, convergence).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
